headline: Bitcoin Nears $63.5K Ahead of Weekly Close

headline: SA Eyes Crypto Tax Under Current 20% Rate

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: Australia Gas Exports Plummet 20% Amid Backlash

article.title: Australia Built a Gas Export Empire. Now the Backlash Is Here
article.summary: Australia’s liquefied natural gas exporters should be riding high on a A$20 billion ($14 billion) sales windfall from the conflict in the Middle East. Instead, their good fortune has triggered a wave of public backlash.

headline: Ethereum 3-Year Upgrade to Rival $20B Merge Impact

article.summary: He said quantum safety has "shifted up a LOT in priority" and that Hegota, slated for later this year, will likely be Ethereum's last "pre-Lean" hard fork.
